title: hedyotis decipiens
intro: Hedyotis decipiens, also known as Chang Shan or Wood Betony, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial effects. Hedyotis decipiens is valued for its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, headache, and digestive issues due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving circulation. Herbal preparations of Hedyotis decipiens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues, although its effectiveness and safety may vary depending on the preparation method and individual tolerance.
